mapper.insert:
insert ignore into tb_notice_entity (notice_number, entity_value, entity_type, file_name, file_url) values
(#{item.noticeNumber}, #{item.entityValue}, #{item.entityType}, #{item.fileName}, #{item.fileUrl})
mapper.select:
SELECT e.entity_id, n.notice_number, e.entity_value, e.entity_type, e.file_name, n.notice_title, e.file_url,
CASE WHEN mk.keyword_id IS NOT NULL THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS matched
FROM tb_notice_entity e
JOIN tb_notice n ON e.notice_number = n.notice_number
LEFT JOIN tb_keyword k ON LOWER(k.standard_word) = LOWER(e.entity_value)
LEFT JOIN tb_member_keyword mk ON mk.keyword_id = k.keyword_id AND mk.member_id = #{memberId}
WHERE e.notice_number = #{noticeNumber}
ORDER BY e.file_name

SELECT DISTINCT e.entity_id, n.notice_number, e.entity_value, e.entity_type, e.file_name, n.notice_title, e.file_url, n.created_at
FROM tb_notice n LEFT JOIN tb_notice_entity e ON n.notice_number = e.notice_number
WHERE
n.notice_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR e.entity_value LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY n.created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO tb_notice_keyword_map (notice_number, keyword_id, entity_type, file_name) VALUES(#{noticeNumber}, #{keywordId}, #{entityType}, #{fileName})
